name: Lionsgate Studios Corp.
summary: PART I . Overview Lionsgate (NYSE: LION) is one of the worlds leading standalone, pure play, publicly-traded content companies. It brings together diversified motion picture and television production and distribution businesses, a world-class portfolio of valuable brands and franchises, a talent management and production powerhouse and a more than 20,000-title film and television library, all driven by Lionsgates bold and entrepreneurial culture.
